content.text:
[Workflow Task from Orchestrator]
Workflow ID: 5f248055-332
Subtask ID: 1a22021a
Priority: 2

Task: Write a complete Python implementation of a Binary Search Tree (BST) with the following requirements:

1. Node class with value, left, and right attributes
2. BST class with:
   - insert(value): Insert a new value into the tree
   - delete(value): Remove a value from the tree (handle all cases: leaf, one child, two children)
   - search(value): Return True if value exists, False otherwise
   - inorder_traversal(): Return list of values in inorder (Left-Root-Right)
   - preorder_traversal(): Return list of values in preorder (Root-Left-Right)
   - postorder_traversal(): Return list of values in postorder (Left-Right-Root)
   - level_order_traversal(): Return list of values level by level (BFS)
   - get_height(): Return the height of the tree
   - get_min(): Return minimum value
   - get_max(): Return maximum value
   - is_empty(): Check if tree is empty

Include docstrings, type hints, and a __repr__ for debugging. Also provide example usage code at the bottom demonstrating all operations.

arguments.message:
[Workflow Task]
Workflow ID: 5f248055-332
Subtask ID: 1a22021a
Priority: 2

Write a complete Python implementation of a Binary Search Tree (BST) with the following requirements:

1. Node class with value, left, and right attributes

2. BST class with:
   - insert(value): Insert a new value into the tree
   - delete(value): Remove a value from the tree (handle all cases: leaf, one child, two children)
   - search(value): Return True if value exists, False otherwise
   - inorder_traversal(): Return list of values in inorder (Left-Root-Right)
   - preorder_traversal(): Return list of values in preorder (Root-Left-Right)
   - postorder_traversal(): Return list of values in postorder (Left-Right-Root)
   - level_order_traversal(): Return list of values level by level (BFS)
   - get_height(): Return the height of the tree
   - get_min(): Return minimum value
   - get_max(): Return maximum value
   - is_empty(): Check if tree is empty

Include docstrings, type hints, and a __repr__ for debugging. Also provide example usage code at the bottom demonstrating all operations.

Return the complete Python file when ready.
